"com.android.tools.idea.streaming.emulator.frame.visible": "false", "com.google.services.firebase.aqiPopupShown": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "new__desing", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "/Users/semyon/StudioProjects/ferma_compose2/app/src/main/java/com/zaroslikov/fermacompose2/ui/project/sections/animal/indicators/count", "project.structure.last.edited": "Modules", "project.structure.proportion": "0.17", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "run.code.analysis.last.selected.profile": "pProject Default", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "memory.settings", "two.files.diff.last.used.file": "D:/Work/_Project/ferma_compose2/data/src/main/java/com/zaroslikov/data/room/converter/CategoryConverter.kt" }, "keyToStringList": { "ExportApk.BuildVariants": [ "release" ], "com.android.tools.idea.sqlite.queryhistory": [ "SELECT an.id, an.name, an.type, an.date, an.date_factory as dateFactory, an.is_group, an.sex, an.food_day,an.food_day_suffix, ac.count AS count, ac.suffix AS suffix,an.archive,an.image_path,an.icon FROM animal_table an LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_COUNT_TABLE ac ON ac.id = ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM ANIMAL_COUNT_TABLE WHERE animal_id = an.id ) WHERE an.idPT = '1' ORDER BY an.id DESC", "SELECT title, type, breed, count, (COALESCE(chick_price, 0.0) * (count - rejected_count)) - (count * COALESCE(price_all, price, 0.0)) AS profit, COALESCE(chick_price, 0.0) * (count - rejected_count) AS income, count - rejected_count AS chicks, count * COALESCE(price_all, price, 0.0) AS expenses, COALESCE(CASE WHEN price_all IS NULL THEN price/count ELSE price_all END, 0.0) AS price_one_egg, COALESCE(price_all, price, 0.0) * (count - rejected_count) AS posted_price, COALESCE(price_all, price, 0.0) * rejected_count AS losses_price, count - rejected_count AS posted_egg, rejected_count AS losses_egg FROM bookmark_incubator WHERE is_activity_bookmark = 0 AND idPT = '1' ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', substr(end_date, 7, 4) || '-' || substr(end_date, 4, 2) || '-' || substr(end_date, 1, 2)) DESC, id DESC", "SELECT * FROM app_settings_table WHERE id=1", "SELECT base.count AS count, base.suffix AS suffix FROM ( SELECT count AS count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM add_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' UNION ALL SELECT -count AS count, count_suffix as suffix FROM sale_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' and animal_count_id IS NULL and animal_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT -count AS count, count_suffix as suffix FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' and animal_count_id IS NULL ) AS base ", "SELECT title, count, suffix FROM ( SELECT title, count , suffix FROM ( SELECT title, count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM add_table WHERE idPT='1' UNION All SELECT title, -count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM sale_table WHERE idPT='1' and animal_count_id IS NULL and animal_id IS NULL UNION All SELECT title, -count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT='1' and animal_count_id IS NULL) )" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "KND" ] } }
